ul.li: Cache Line Alignment: struct arp_entry is padded to 64B. __attribute__((aligned(64))) is mandatory to prevent False Sharing between hardware threads updating adjacent indices.

Memory Barriers: Explicit sfence/lfence or compiler barriers (atomic_thread_fence) are required between sequence counter increments and data access to ensure store-visibility on x86/ARM architectures.
Linear Probing: Table size is 256. At >70% load factor, performance degrades; the gc() method is triggered by lookup() if expired TTLs are encountered during probing.
Volatile Semantics: The seq counter must be accessed via volatile or atomic pointers to bypass register caching by the compiler.

ol.li: IF seq_start != seq_end OR odd(seq_start) RETRY

path.d: M NaN NaN L NaN NaN
M NaN NaN L NaN NaN
